title: Sealapack Ready To Use Greaseproof Paper, 37 cm X 8 m
features: HYGIENIC: Sealapack Greaseproof Paper is perfect to wrap a variety of foods for lunch boxes or picnics. Wrapped foods can be heated in the microwave whilst wrapped, take care when opening a hot wrap from the oven or microwave.
SUNDAY ROAST: Save slices of chicken, lamb, beef or ham. Wrap securely in greaseproof paper, freeze until required
BAKE, WRAP, FREEZE: Sealapack Greaseproof Paper is bleach free, ready to use, in the oven, microwave or freezer
VERSATILE: No waste, cut as required, line cake tins, pastry cases, wrap or separate foods, a roll of greasseproof paper is an essential kitchen item
ABOUT THE PRODUCT: ROLL 37CM x 8M ROLL
